{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221124529F758066ED40DD9666E5"}"},"total":3},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7588822615790568216","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看了前几章，很有氛围感，没热度可能是开篇关于打游戏的碎碎念太多、文字分段少吧，我觉得改一下观感会好很多。希望作者坚持更下去。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1766914083,"group_id":"7575778030128204824","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N26VanfZ9m3wd1aUf733Kgs=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"59796576809610","user_name":"济安县的黑崎一心"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"59796576809610","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7575778030128204824","book_info":{"abstract":"科幻，末世，天灾，第一人称，末日求生，废土，囤物资，   
2055年国庆，一场永无止境的暴雨将城市切割成孤岛。宅男林默为五千块报酬，成为新型病毒抗体试验的“小白鼠”。注射当晚，他高烧不退，醒来时世界已然倾覆——断网、断电、通讯死寂。

一种名为“噬灵症”的怪病在雨中蔓延：便利店收银员的眼瞳竖起，利爪撞碎玻璃；楼道野猫皮毛脱落，化作嘶哑的影子；电梯门缝渗出淡绿色粘液，整栋出租楼沦为猎场。

起初，他只是想活着。最后一桶泡面撑过三天，他用镜子碎片窥探楼道，凭注射后异常敏锐的感官，在黑暗中屏息、绕行、逃窜。当隔壁独居老人的门缝渗出腥臭粘液，当深夜撕咬声穿透墙壁，他明白——恐惧已无处可藏。

于是，他用书架堵死门窗，自制监控窥视变异者的巡猎轨迹，在雨声掩护下翻找废弃房间。一柄厨刀握在手中时，那个浑噩的宅男第一次有了守护者的轮廓。

雨还在下。药剂的秘密、病毒的真相、城市的出路，都隐没在湿冷的雾中。林默的求生，才刚刚开始。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/ai-mark/534458a3042ca097279a7ecf015f63af~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"煜煜生澪","author_id":"","book_id":"7575778030128204824","book_name":"末日求生之雨幕围城","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#100808","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":494,"name":"囤物资","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=494&name=囤物资&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":515,"name":"末日求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=515&name=末日求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":871,"name":"第一人称","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=871&name=第一人称&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":658,"name":"天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=658&name=天灾&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":869,"name":"废土","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=869&name=废土&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7575778124328092184","read_count":"94","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1341498"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"288","tags":"科幻末世,末世,囤物资,末日求生,第一人称,天灾,求生,废土","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oae2b84aee3217646a79d35702fa591f5~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779333892&x-signature=uxlCfql%2FkkLFnCP6lZuFIfRenCo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4196160949195997","extra":{"c
